p.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

div.p: Expansion performed internally based on codesystem SBC Benefit Category Code System v0.1.0 (CodeSystem)

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="http://flexpa.com/fhir/sbc/CodeSystem/sbc-benefit-category"><version value="0.1.0"><code value="mental-health-outpatient"><display value="Mental/Behavioral Health Outpatient Services"></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="http://flexpa.com/fhir/sbc/CodeSystem/sbc-benefit-category"><version value="0.1.0"><code value="mental-health-inpatient"><display value="Mental/Behavioral Health Inpatient Services"></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="http://flexpa.com/fhir/sbc/CodeSystem/sbc-benefit-category"><version value="0.1.0"><code value="pregnancy-home-health"><display value="Pregnancy Home Health Care"></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

p.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

div.p: Expansion performed internally based on codesystem SBC Plan Type Code System v0.1.0 (CodeSystem)

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="http://flexpa.com/fhir/sbc/CodeSystem/sbc-plan-type"><version value="0.1.0"><code value="HDHP"><display value="High Deductible Health Plan (HDHP)"></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding
